recommendations.title: The Palace
recommendations.overview: A comedy set on New Year’s Eve 1999 in a luxurious hotel in the Swiss Alps where the lives of various guests and those who work for them intersect.

recommendations.title: Les Misérables
recommendations.overview: In 19th century France, Jean Valjean, a man imprisoned for stealing bread, must flee a relentless policeman named Javert. The pursuit consumes both men's lives, and soon Valjean finds himself in the midst of the student revolutions in France.

recommendations.title: Letters to Santa
recommendations.overview: A romantic comedy set on Christmas Eve in Warsaw and centered around a series of characters.

recommendations.title: Blown Away
recommendations.overview: After her mother is killed by a car bomb, a 17-year-old girl lives a reckless and decadent lifestyle. She begins having sex with a boy who works at a local ski resort. He falls in love, and she tells him of her suspicions that her strict father was r

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Gourmet Ghost
recommendations.overview: The Scooby gang visits a culinary resort run by Fred's uncle, Bobby Flay. While enjoying the sights, a ghost attacks the guests and destroys the resort, leaving the gang to put a stop to its threat.

recommendations.title: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
recommendations.overview: A sprawling drama centered on five key days in a family's life.

recommendations.title: Skirt Day
recommendations.overview: A teacher, driven to exasperation from insults and insubordination, takes her class hostage.

recommendations.title: The World Unseen
recommendations.overview: A drama centered on two women who engage in a dangerous relationship during South Africa's apartheid era.

recommendations.title: Blancanieves
recommendations.overview: A black and white silent movie, based on the Snow White fairy tale, that is set in a romantic version of 1920s Seville and centered on a female bullfighter.

recommendations.title: A Promise
recommendations.overview: A romantic drama set in Germany just before WWI and centered on a married woman who falls in love with her husband's teacher. Separated by the war, they pledge their devotion to one another.
